backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining contact form submission and product management APIs with types for ContactFormEntry, ProductDetail (with specifications, nutrition, variants), and CRUD operations for both entities using List and Map data structures.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three deployment-related features (frontend build verification, asset validation, and redeployment) with high confidence mappings to test IDs REQ-41, REQ-42, and REQ-43.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing the React application structure with TanStack Router, product pages with category filtering, contact form integration, admin dashboard, and styling configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes, defining primary, secondary, muted, accent, and sidebar color schemes with border radius and chart color definitions.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the FarmSiddhi application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component configuring TanStack Router with eight routes (Home, About, Products, ProductDetail, FarmerNetwork, Exports, Contact, Admin), QueryClient provider, InternetIdentity provider, shared Layout with Navigation/Footer, watermark background, and Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying FarmSiddhi logo, contact information placeholders, social media links (LinkedIn, X, Facebook), copyright notice, and Caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive navigation header with FarmSiddhi logo, desktop and mobile menu implementations, active route highlighting using primary colors, and links to all seven main pages plus Admin.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, returning anonymous actor when unauthenticated, and invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and context provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for backend API interactions including contact form submission/retrieval and product detail queries with category filtering support.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, component utilities for section layouts, and a watermark background styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutUs.tsx: About page displaying FarmSiddhi's vision, mission, and business model in card layouts with icons, plus additional content explaining the platform's value proposition.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin dashboard page that displays all contact form submissions in a table with loading/error states, user type badges, and submission count.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUs.tsx: Contact page with a form for submitting inquiries (name, email, phone, message, user type) and a sidebar displaying contact information cards with icons.
frontend/src/pages/Exports.tsx: Displays export services page with quality assurance, packaging, logistics, global trade support, and compliance services. Includes a certifications section showcasing international standards.
frontend/src/pages/FarmerNetwork.tsx: Presents farmer network page highlighting direct procurement, fair pricing, aggregation platform, quality standardization, and supply chain digitization. Features a benefits section for farmers.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Main landing page with hero section, introduction to FarmSiddhi platform, services grid (aggregation, quality control, processing, packaging, logistics), and product showcase with navigation links.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Dynamic product detail page that fetches products by category using useGetProductsByCategory hook, displays product information with image, specifications table, and handles loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx: Products catalog page displaying grid of agricultural products (rice, wheat, pulses, spices, processed foods, makhana) with images, descriptions, and varieties, linking to individual product detail pages.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom color palette using OKLCH color space, extended theme with container settings, custom shadows, Inter font family, and accordion animations. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for FarmSiddhi corporate website with 6 main pages (Home, About, Products, Farmer Network, Exports, Contact), silver green/brown color scheme, and B2B export focus. Documents known issues with product detail pages not displaying properly and deployment errors.
